data.name: Msg_ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

data.name: Msg_AccessDenied
data.value: Access denied. You are not authorized to access this page.

data.name: Msg_PageLoadError
data.value: The page could not load correctly. Please try again.

data.name: Msg_SubmitConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to submit this voucher for approval?

data.name: Msg_ApproveConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to approve this voucher?

data.name: Msg_RejectConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to reject this voucher?

data.name: Msg_ReturnConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to return this voucher?

data.name: Msg_CancelConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this voucher?

data.name: Err_Message
data.value: The page could not load correctly. Please try again.

data.name: Dash_Subtitle
data.value: Real-time overview of material entry and exit vouchers.

data.name: SuiviBons_Subtitle
data.value: Track the progress of your pending approval requests

data.name: SuiviBons_NoPending
data.value: You have no vouchers pending approval

data.name: BemF_PageTitleNew
data.value: New Entry Voucher - KCC Material Flow

data.name: BemF_PageTitleEdit
data.value: Edit Entry Voucher - KCC Material Flow

data.name: BemF_CannotEdit
data.value: This voucher can no longer be edited

data.name: BemF_CannotEditMsg
data.value: Only draft vouchers can be edited.

data.name: BemV_AccessDeniedMsg
data.value: You are not authorized to view this voucher.

data.name: Dlg_ApproveDesc
data.value: You are about to approve this entry voucher.

data.name: Dlg_ReturnDesc
data.value: This voucher will be returned to the requester for modification. Please indicate the necessary corrections.

data.name: Dlg_RejectDesc
data.value: This voucher will be permanently rejected. This action is irreversible.

data.name: Appro_NoPendingDesc
data.value: You have no vouchers to validate at the moment.

data.name: Appro_ApprovedReprintDesc
data.value: These vouchers were approved at your level. You can reprint them at any time.

data.name: Rejets_Subtitle
data.value: View rejected vouchers and their reasons

data.name: Rejets_NoneDesc
data.value: No rejected voucher matches the criteria.

data.name: AccDen_Message
data.value: Your account does not have the necessary permissions to access KCC Material Flow. To request access, please submit a request via the ServiceNow portal.

data.name: AccDen_Help
data.value: Need help? Contact your IT administrator —

data.name: BsmF_SelectTypeFirst
data.value: Select exit voucher type to continue.

data.name: BsmF_LoanModeInfo
data.value: Loan of KCC materials — no entry permit (BEM) required.

data.name: BsmF_OriginFromBEM
data.value: Origin is defined by the source BEM.

data.name: View_NotAllowed
data.value: You are not authorized to view this voucher.

data.name: Adm_WorkflowDesc
data.value: Configure the approval chain by department. A specific workflow overrides the generic one.

data.name: Adm_SpecialApproversDesc
data.value: Defines the Superintendent / OPJ / Identification employees used at the end of the approval chain.

data.name: Adm_NoSpecialApprovers
data.value: No special approver defined. Click Add to get started.

data.name: Adm_AuditDesc
data.value: Traceability of actions performed in the system

data.name: Adm_ParametersDesc
data.value: System parameter configuration organized by category

data.name: Adm_RolesDesc
data.value: Overview of access levels and users with administrative rights.

data.name: Scan_Subtitle
data.value: Scan the material voucher QR code to validate the passage

data.name: Scan_Prompt
data.value: Enter the QR code or the voucher reference number:

data.name: Scan_StartMsg
data.value: Please select your checkpoint to start scanning

data.name: Scan_DocumentUsed
data.value: Document Already Used at This Checkpoint

data.name: Anomalies_Subtitle
data.value: Tracking and processing of reported anomalies

data.name: Users_HrSource
data.value: Source = HR database. Only employees with a Windows account can access the application.

data.name: Roles_StandardUserDesc
data.value: Can create and submit material entry and exit vouchers. Receives follow-up notifications on their vouchers.

data.name: Msg_BonRejected
data.value: The entry permit has been rejected.

data.name: Msg_BonReturned
data.value: The entry permit has been returned to the requester.

data.name: BsmF_PageTitleNew
data.value: New Exit Permit - KCC Material Flow

data.name: BsmF_PageTitleEdit
data.value: Edit Exit Permit - KCC Material Flow

data.name: BsmF_SearchEmployee
data.value: Search by name, code or login...

data.name: BsmF_SelectTypeContinue
data.value: Select the exit permit type to continue.

data.name: BsmF_SearchBemPlaceholder
data.value: Search by number, company or department...

data.name: BsmF_SourceFromBem
data.value: Origin is defined by the source BEM.

data.name: BsmF_CannotEdit
data.value: This permit can no longer be modified

data.name: BsmF_ExitReasonPlaceholder
data.value: Describe the reason for this exit...

data.name: Bem_InvalidId
data.value: Please enter a valid numeric ID

data.name: Ad_Subtitle
data.value: Your account does not have the necessary permissions to access KCC Material Flow. To request access, please submit a request via the ServiceNow portal.

data.name: Ad_Help
data.value: Need help? Contact your IT administrator —

data.name: Anl_Subtitle
data.value: Tracking and processing of reported anomalies

data.name: Sqr_Subtitle
data.value: Scan the material document QR code to validate the passage

data.name: Sqr_ManualHint
data.value: Enter the QR code or document reference number:

data.name: Sqr_SelectBarriere
data.value: Please select your barrier to start scanning

data.name: Tad_ResolutionPlaceholder
data.value: Describe how the anomaly was resolved...

data.name: Rad_Prompt
data.value: Please indicate the reason for reopening this anomaly.

data.name: Adb_Alert_CriticalMsg
data.value: These anomalies require immediate attention from the Investigation team.

data.name: Adl_DocTriggered
data.value: This document triggered the anomaly during a security check.

data.name: BsPrint_AccessMsg
data.value: Only the last approver (Identification) can print this permit.

data.name: Msg_FillRequired
data.value: Please fill in all required fields.

data.name: PExt_Note
data.value: Note: The extension of the return date is reserved for the Identification department.

data.name: PRet_AlreadyReturned
data.value: This loan was already returned on

data.name: PRet_DamageAlert
data.value: Please describe the damage or missing items.

data.name: PRet_ObsPlaceholder
data.value: Describe the condition of the material...

data.name: Wed_GenericWorkflow
data.value: This workflow applies to all departments without specific configuration.

data.name: Rol_Subtitle
data.value: Overview of access levels and users with administrative rights.

data.name: Rol_DescStandard
data.value: Can create and submit material entry and exit slips. Receives tracking notifications.

data.name: Rol_DescAdmin
data.value: Access to Admin space. Can manage users, configure workflows and system parameters. Cannot modify SuperAdmins.

data.name: Rol_DescSuperAdmin
data.value: Full unrestricted access. Manages Admin and SuperAdmin, uses impersonation and accesses full audit logs.

data.name: Wfa_Subtitle
data.value: Defines Superintendent / OPJ / Identification employees used at the end of the approval chain.

data.name: Imp_Subtitle
data.value: Simulate another employee's session to check what they see. Reserved for real SuperAdmin.

data.name: Imp_SearchPh
data.value: Employee code, name or department… (min. 2 characters)

data.name: Imp_TypeMin2
data.value: Type at least 2 characters to search.

data.name: Imd_Subtitle
data.value: Load DATA.xlsx → staging (Companies / Contracts) + direct employee upsert with ReportTo resolution

data.name: Imd_Step1Title
data.value: Step 1 — Load xlsx file to staging

data.name: Imd_Step1Hint
data.value: The file must contain 3 sheets: Company, Contract, Sheet3 (employees).

data.name: Imd_NoBatch
data.value: No pending import batch. Load a file above.

data.name: Usr_Hint
data.value: Source = HR directory. Only employees with a Windows account can access the application. Active = Windows account present. Inactive = no Windows account.

data.name: Wfl_Subtitle
data.value: Configure the approval chain per department. A specific workflow takes priority over the generic one.

data.name: Rol_NoAdminFound
data.value: No account with administrative rights found. Assign an Admin level from the page

data.name: Dlg_PlOptComment
data.value: Comment (optional for approval — required for rejection)...

data.name: BsmF_PlCommentOptional
data.value: Optional comment (shown in parentheses when printed)

data.name: UnifiedSearch_Placeholder
data.value: Search a voucher (reference no., company, requester...)

data.name: Err_UnauthorizedDesc
data.value: You do not have the necessary permissions to access this page.

data.name: Err_404Desc
data.value: The page you are looking for does not exist.

data.name: ComingSoon_Desc
data.value: This feature is under development and will be available in a future update.

data.name: Err_LoginExists
data.value: A user with login « {0} » already exists.

data.name: Err_MatriculeExists
data.value: An account already exists for this employee ID.

data.name: Usr_SelectDeptForGM
data.value: Select a department to automatically see the GM.

data.name: Usr_LoginWindowsHint
data.value: Windows identifier that will allow the employee to log in.

data.name: Wfl_ConfirmResetMsg
data.value: Remove the specific configuration for {0}? The department will inherit the generic workflow.

data.name: Notif_DeleteDraftConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete draft {0}?

data.name: Bsm_NotifBonSubmitted
data.value: Bon {0} created and submitted for approval

data.name: Adm_HintPermanentDate
data.value: Leave the end date empty for a permanent assignment

data.name: Rej_WarningIrreversible
data.value: Warning: This action is irreversible. The bon will be permanently rejected.
